programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Doraemon

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Supercharged
programme.desc: This is Sport - Racing Category.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Hoping to change the future, a quirky robot cat travels back in time and offers a plethora of futuristic gadgets to solve a slow-witted boy's everyday problems.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Twin feline brothers, Honey and Bunny, navigate thrilling escapades across India. They confront adversaries while maintaining unwavering loyalty and protection for one another.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Masao are requested by Takeshi to take him to Masao's house. However, Shin-chan takes him to his house instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is staying at Yoshinaga's house, he snoops around to find something different. However, Yoshinaga catches him in the act.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: One day Shin-chan carries a chick to his kindergarten and leaves it in the poultry farm. Consequently, some of the birds get out of the farm.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan to a restaurant to eat noodles. However, when Shin-chan tries to pour noodles into his bowl, he drops them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When the progressively worsening weather forces Misae and Shin-chan to remain indoors, they wait until Hiroshi returns from work and then fall asleep together.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As Misae is about to go out, Shin-chan decides on a code for him and her. Later, when a courier arrives, Shin-chan pesters him and makes him use the code.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits Keiko-san at the hospital with Misae and raises a nuisance for the nurse. Consequently, Misae scolds him for his mischief.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to buy taiyaki for his mother Misae, Shin-chan visits a store. However, he proceeds to cause a nuisance and annoy the storekeeper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a soccer match, Kawamura faces Shin-chan and his friends. However, he underestimates their skills and ends up losing to them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan demands that his mother blow balloons and play with him and does not give her any reprieve, Misae obliges.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is left at home by Misae to take care of Shiro and the household whilst she steps out to shop for groceries. However, on returning she finds the house in a mess.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a school trip, Shin-chan acts mischievously and pesters Yoshinaga. Later, Shin-chan drops Kazama's handkerchief when they visit the washroom.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: The cockroaches are hit with a zap from Oggy's recently discovered time-freezing weapon. They ultimately awaken in the future, where they find Oggy and Jack in their old age.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy decides to undertake a cleaning and pushes a drawer, only to be confronted by a mouse, which results in a state of extreme distress for him and the cockroaches.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy is playing with the doll and the dollhouse. However, when Marky sees the doll, he falls in love with it and eventually marries it.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a complacent cat, finds his tranquil life of leisure disrupted by mischievous cockroaches who relentlessly raid his refrigerator and create pandemonium throughout his home.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy seemingly defeats the cockroaches with a frying pan, but they return as ghosts, tormenting him with real-life nightmares.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy kills the cockroaches with a frying pan, but their ghosts return to haunt him, turning his life into a series of nightmarish experiences.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
programme.desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches

programme.title: Oggy and the Cockroaches

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.

programme.title: Shin Chan Movie - Villian Aur Dulhan
programme.desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Shin-chan decides to help others, he is met by a man who seeks directions to Kazama's house. However, Shin-chan annoys him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Yoshinaga ends up losing her sandal, Shin-chan tries to play detective with his friends and discovers that it was stolen by a dog.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The students of the kindergarten are trained by Yoshinaga in properly executing the evacuation process in the event of a fire or some other calamity.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae falls ill, Shin-chan tries to care for her and fills an ice bag with water. However, he leaves the tap running and causes the house to flood.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After purchasing dog food for Shiro, Misae instructs Shin-chan to feed Shiro on time. However, Shin-chan forgets to do so.

programme.title: Shin Chan Kasukabe Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Kasukabe's new mayor, Eco Loco, transforms all residents into animals, urging a return to primal roots. The Nohara family adjusts to new forms, like Misae's cat and Hiroshi's rooster.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits the department store with his mother. However, once there, he wanders around and realises that he is lost.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As the winter season reaches its conclusion, the students at the kindergarten and Yoshinaga celebrate by throwing beans out in the air.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Misae decide to spend some time playing badminton with Shin-chan, they disagree mid-game and begin to quarrel.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae plans on preparing a meal for Hiroshi's client but she forgets a few ingredients. As a result, she instructs Shin-chan to fetch them.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Shin-chan need a haircut, they visit a salon but Shin-chan annoys the barber with his mischief and causes her to quit.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Saloni is happy that her birthday is falling on a Sunday, so that she can have a party at home. Meanwhile, Bhayankar Pari plans to capture Sunday and delete it from everybody's memory.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised to find people enjoying on a Monday inspite of Sunday being a holiday. Later, Baal Veer tries to find the truth behind this.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Kids are tensed as nobody remembers Sunday, the day of the week, except them. Nokili Pari tries to erase the day from the memory of the kids, while Baalveer fights Bhayankar Pari at 'Asmani Parvat'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide begins to reprimand Tapu Sena, Champaklal intervenes. As Bhide tries to justify himself, Champaklal rebukes him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A new family embarks on their journey in Gokuldham colony. Later, during Ganesh Utsav, they make a heartfelt request to Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Colony buzzes with excitement as festive decorations go up for Bappa's arrival. Later, Tapu Sena intervenes and establishes a set of rules for everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members readily accept Tapu Sena's new rules and start following them right away. Meanwhile, the Binjola kids set their own conditions before anyone can enjoy the prasad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Binjola children refuse to allow anyone to eat the prasad until Bappa receives his portion. Soon, this causes an escalating situation among the colony members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Devotees begin complaining that they have not yet received the prasad, sparking tensions. Soon, the situation leads to Bhide being summoned to find a resolution for the issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal attempts to persuade the children to eat and abandon their stubbornness. But soon, a new problem suddenly emerges.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members look forward to Tapu sharing his idea so that they can start the Rangarang program. Later, during the aarti, the plan is set into motion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Veer and Bansri are devastated by what the colony members have done. Soon, the colony members leaves everything up to Bappa.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Lord Ganesh, touched by Veer and Bansri's devotion, accepts their laddoos and appears before them. Afterward, the children gather everyone in the society compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members offer their prayers and prasad to Bappa. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena undertakes the distribution of prasad to those on the list.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham society exuberantly celebrates Ganesh Chaturthi, where Popatlal delivers a dazzling performance, followed by a charming performance by the Bhide family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak recites poetry, and after the performances of the elders, Taapu Sena plans to dazzle everyone with a dance performance.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When Dr Salunkhe examines the body of a man who collapsed while walking, he learns that the victim was infected by a contagious virus. Later, the killer informs the police that he has six hostages.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When the third hostage infected by a deadly virus is released, the CID team must race against time to find the victim. Moreover, they must also find the remaining clues to save the other hostages.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide worries as Sonu has not returned home and is not answering calls. Later, when Goli and Gogi arrive, Bhide leaves to find Sonu himself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and the others worry about the future of their children, including the marriage proposals they have received. But Bhide is particularly worried when he finds that Sonu's phone is switched off.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide learns that Sonu and Tapu have already left the party. So, he heads out on his own to search for them when they do not come home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu confess their love for each other to Bhide. But this revelation leaves Bhide and Madhuri utterly shocked and speechless.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal suggests it is time for Tapu's marriage to Jethalal. Meanwhile, Bhide worries they might ask for Sonu's hand in marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide decides to expedite his search for a groom for Sonu when he learns about her and Tapu's relationship. Meanwhile, Bapuji also begins to search for a bride for Tapu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu discover their parents' plans for their arranged marriages to other people. But, both of them refuse the marriage proposals, causing their parents to become concerned.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati
programme.desc: Harsh Shah continues with attempting her best on the hot seat. Later, Alolika Bhattacharjee Guha, takes up the hot seat and gears up for the game.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are shocked as Madanlal taunts them about their inability to bring him to justice. He leaves the resort with Inspector Pandey's permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha cannot believe their ears when Inspector Pandey declares the mission a success.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide grows uncomfortable after watching Tapu and his friends dance together. Tapu tries to convince him to join them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali and Taarak ponder Popatlal's marital future. The kids in Gokuldham Society introduce a new game for Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi and Bhide argue about her cooking. The men of the Gokuldham Society gather at Abdul's soda shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal upsets Popatlal with a negative comment about his marriage. An unknown person starts playing the violin in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal discovers a matchmaker called Vinu Kaka and gets excited to get advice about his marriage prospects.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal asks Jethalal what he thinks about the advice Vinu Kaka gave him. Bhide feels very worried after Vinu Kaka sees something bad in Sonu's hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal visits Gada Electronics for help. Babita and Anjali encourage him to change his name for his luck with women.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak wants to finish writing his article, but in a society like Gokuldham, he ends up facing many unwelcome interruptions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is eager to eat a delicious feast prepared by Daya. However, an electricity issue quickly ruins his dinner plans.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal heads to Babita and Iyer's house to handle the tube light issue. However, trouble arises when Jethalal lands in a tricky situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi arrives to check on Jethalal, who appears to be in shock. Everyone learns about Jethalal's bizarre phobia.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's trauma increases when he sees terrifying dreams involving electricity. Champaklal asks the others to help him help Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A sudden power cut leaves all of Gokuldham Society in shambles. However, Jethalal has no problems with the lack of electricity.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members celebrate when Jethalal overcomes his fear of electricity and turns on the lights of the flats in a bid to save Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of the Gokuldham Society organise a traditional ceremony, but their husbands are reluctant to stay awake all night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the women prepare for the ceremony and try to persuade their husbands to join, Taarak astounds them with a surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society's men join the ladies and Tapu Sena for a ceremony and compete in a game of antakshari.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide organises a meeting for Gokuldham Society's anniversary, but the residents disagree on plans. Tapu and his friends eventually come up with an ideal solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Comedian Raju Srivastav joins Gokuldham Society's anniversary celebration with the cast and crew of `Teree Sang: A Kidult Love Story'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Raju Srivastav delivers a captivating stand-up performance during Gokuldham Society's anniversary celebration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal begins the year happily by seeing Babita. Bhide ruins his mood by demanding payment of the maintenance bill.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: People gather at Jethalal's store when they begin selling a brand new phone. Tapu asks Jethalal to reserve one of them for him.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: King Himavan rejoices as celestial beings bless his newborn daughter Parvati. Meanwhile, the demon Tarakasur schemes to thwart her destiny of uniting with Lord Shiva and becoming Shakti.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: DSP Anubhav asks Haseena to keep pretending that they are in love with each other. However, things take an unexpected turn when Karishma overhears their conversation.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma becomes furious when Haseena refuses to take her along for the mission. Later, DSP Anubhav reveals the truth behind Haseena's intentions.

programme.desc: Although the society members are waiting for Pinku's parents, they do not show up on time. So, Champaklal and others leave for the court for Pinku's adoption.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Crime Patrol 2.0
programme.desc: After leaving work late, Pragati, a hair stylist, is spotted by someone with a grudge towards her. Later she is found brutally attacked and left to die at the side of the road.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Krushna, Jamie, Kiku and the other team members entertain the guests with their humour.

programme.title: Master Chef India
programme.desc: Aspiring chefs and food lovers from various parts of India showcase their culinary skills in front of prominent judges to win the title and grand prize money.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: In today's episode of Crime Patrol showcases a case about a girl named Rihana from West Bengal and her broken dream which left her shattered.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol Satark
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: People across villages travel to meet Sai on 'guru purnima'. Later, Sai gives away coins to those who came to visit him.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kulkarni questions Chakranarayan when he feels wary of his motives. Meanwhile, Nanasaheb attempts to alert Sai.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Chakranarayan is revealed to be a British agent on a mission to kidnap Sai. Meanwhile, Nanasaheb attempts to alert Sai, but Sai asks him not to be worried.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Chakranarayan manages to steal Sai's 'potli' and is shook on finding what's inside. Meanwhile, Raghav seeks Sai's advice for a problem he's been facing.
